ranked_ideas.idea: Vibe coding a full app in 30 minutes with Claude Code
ranked_ideas.title_suggestion: 30 मिनट में पूरा App बना दिया! Claude Code से LIVE 😱
ranked_ideas.hook: मैं बिना plan किए अभी एक full app बनाने वाला हूं Claude से... और अगर fail हो गया तो पूरा video upload करूंगा!
ranked_ideas.reasoning: Time-bound challenges are viral gold. Live coding anxiety + AI assistance creates natural drama. Hindi tech audience loves speed coding content.
ranked_ideas.angle: Unscripted, high-stakes live building with real-time problem solving and potential failure

ranked_ideas.idea: Building a YouTube script generator that writes better than humans
ranked_ideas.title_suggestion: AI ने मेरे लिए Viral Script लिख दिया! 🤯 (Claude vs ChatGPT Battle)
ranked_ideas.hook: आज मैं ऐसा AI script generator बनाऊंगा जो मुझसे भी बेहतर YouTube videos के लिए scripts लिखेगा... let's see कौन जीतता है!
ranked_ideas.reasoning: Meta-content (making tools for content creation) performs well. Direct benefit to audience. AI comparison adds competitive element.
ranked_ideas.angle: Self-referential challenge - building the tool that could replace the creator, with live A/B testing

ranked_ideas.idea: My complete YouTube automation system exposed (N8N + AI workflow)
ranked_ideas.title_suggestion: मैं YouTube पर Cheating कर रहा था! 😳 पूरी Automation दिखा रहा हूं
ranked_ideas.hook: Guys confession time - मैं पिछले 6 महीने से YouTube पर automation use कर रहा हूं... आज सब कुछ reveal कर रहा हूं including failures!
ranked_ideas.reasoning: Behind-the-scenes content is highly engaging. Confession angle creates curiosity. Practical value for creators.
ranked_ideas.angle: Honest reveal of creator's secret workflow with transparent breakdown of what works/doesn't

ranked_ideas.idea: Building a RAG system that knows everything about my YouTube channel
ranked_ideas.title_suggestion: AI को अपना पूरा YouTube Channel समझा दिया! 🧠 (RAG System Live Build)
ranked_ideas.hook: आज मैं अपने YouTube channel का clone brain बना रहा हूं... ये AI मेरे सारे videos को समझकर नए ideas देगा!
ranked_ideas.reasoning: RAG is trending in AI circles. Personal application makes it relatable. Technical but valuable for audience growth.
ranked_ideas.angle: Personal AI assistant creation with immediate practical testing on real channel data

ranked_ideas.idea: ChatGPT vs Claude Code battle: Building the same app twice
ranked_ideas.title_suggestion: ChatGPT vs Claude: Same App, कौन तेज़? 🥊 (Live Coding Battle)
ranked_ideas.hook: आज ultimate battle है - same app बनाऊंगा दोनों AI से... देखते हैं कौन जीतता है speed, quality और user experience में!
ranked_ideas.reasoning: Comparison content performs well but market is saturated. Split-screen format could be engaging but complex to execute.
ranked_ideas.angle: Head-to-head live building competition with real-time performance metrics and honest comparison

top_pick.idea: Vibe coding a full app in 30 minutes with Claude Code
top_pick.why: High-stakes time pressure + AI assistance + potential failure = viral content formula. Demonstrates real AI development workflow authentically.
